Package neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.pipeline

Class NorsokP002LineSizingValidator

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.pipeline.NorsokP002LineSizingValidator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class NorsokP002LineSizingValidator extends Object implements Serializable
NORSOK P-002 screening validator for process line sizing.

The validator checks a simulated pipeline against configurable screening limits for velocity, pressure gradient, and erosional velocity. It intentionally uses PipeLineInterface, so it works with the empirical and mechanistic pipe models already available in NeqSim.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team
See Also:

    • setMaximumErosionalVelocityFraction

      public NorsokP002LineSizingValidator setMaximumErosionalVelocityFraction(double fraction)
      Sets the maximum fraction of erosional velocity allowed.
      Parameters:
      fraction - maximum fraction of erosional velocity; 0.80 means 80 percent
      Returns:
      this validator for chaining

    • validate

      public NorsokP002LineSizingValidator.LineSizingResult validate(PipeLineInterface pipe)
      Validates a pipeline against NORSOK P-002 screening limits.
      Parameters:
      pipe - pipeline model that has been run or configured with inlet stream and geometry
      Returns:
      line-sizing result
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if pipe is null

      Returns:
      velocity in m/s, or NaN when unavailable
